---
pagetitle: "Simon Yan — Data Scientist, Quantitative Analyst & AI/ML Engineer"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== HERO ========== -->
::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-inner}

[Open to 2026 Opportunities]{.hero-label}

# [Simon Yan]{.hero-name}

[Turning market complexity into **quantitative signals**, **AI systems**, and **decisions people can act on** — across quant finance, machine learning, and data engineering.]{.hero-title}

:::: {.hero-credentials}
::: {.credential-item}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> M.P.S. Information Science · **Cornell University**]{.credential-text}
:::
::: {.credential-item}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> B.A. Geography: Data Science · **University of Washington**]{.credential-text}
:::
::::

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i> Explore My Work](projects.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::

[<i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i>](#stats){.hero-scroll aria-label="Scroll down"}

:::

<!-- ========== STATS ========== -->
::: {#stats .stats-strip}
::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-item}
### 2
Quant-Finance Internships
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 10+
Projects Shipped
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 100K+
Daily Records Engineered
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 2026
Cornell Graduate
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== FEATURED PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-wide}

::: {.reveal}
[Featured Work]{.section-label}

## Selected Projects {.section-heading}

A cross-section of my work spanning quantitative finance, applied machine learning, and AI systems — each grounded in real data and real stakeholders.
:::

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card .reveal}
::: {.card-top}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
:::
::: {.track-badges}
[Quant]{.track-badge .quant}
:::
:::

### Private Equity Forecast Analysis

[The Riverside Company · Quantitative Analyst Lead (team of 7)]{.role-line}

Led a 7-person team analyzing a private-equity portfolio, combining statistical testing (chi-square, logistic regression) and time-series regression on IRR / GCoC to evaluate projection accuracy and surface sector-level outperformance signals. Found *no* statistically significant link between projection accuracy and exit success — a counterintuitive result that reframed the client's underwriting assumptions.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Logistic Regression]{.tag} [Time-Series]{.tag} [Statistical Testing]{.tag} [Leadership]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/Private-Equity-Forecast-Quantitative-Analysis){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .reveal .d1}
::: {.card-top}
::: {.card-icon .purple}
<i class="bi bi-robot"></i>
:::
::: {.track-badges}
[AI / FDE]{.track-badge .ai}
:::
:::

### Wikipedia RAG ChatBot

[Team Leader (team of 3) · R · Shiny · OpenAI + MediaWiki APIs]{.role-line}

Architected and deployed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation web app with an automated query-optimization pipeline and source-grounded prompt design that measurably reduces LLM hallucination. Shipped a reactive UI with session history and exportable citations — end-to-end from question to verifiable, cited answer.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.tag} [Shiny]{.tag} [RAG]{.tag} [OpenAI API]{.tag} [Posit Cloud]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/Wiki-ChatBot-RAG-){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://019ae764-a793-59ee-0e7a-bba44f6653b4.share.connect.posit.cloud/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .reveal .d2}
::: {.card-top}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-water"></i>
:::
::: {.track-badges}
[Quant]{.track-badge .quant} [Data]{.track-badge .data}
:::
:::

### Predicting NFIP Flood Claims

[FEMA National Flood Insurance Program · ~500K claims]{.role-line}

Built and benchmarked Lasso, Random Forest, and XGBoost models on ~500K cleaned FEMA claims (54 features) to predict flood-insurance payouts — XGBoost reached **R² = 0.956**, an 80% RMSE reduction over baseline. Used SHAP and Partial Dependence Plots to translate the model into interpretable risk drivers for insurance pricing.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [XGBoost]{.tag} [SHAP]{.tag} [Interpretability]{.tag}
:::
:::

:::

::: {.text-center .mt-3 .reveal}
[View All Projects <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== SKILLS SNAPSHOT ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-alt}
::: {.section-wide}

::: {.reveal}
[Expertise]{.section-label}

## Skills & Technologies {.section-heading}

Three tracks, one toolkit — quantitative research, AI/ML engineering, and data analytics.
:::

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-category .reveal}
<h4><i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line"></i> Quantitative Finance</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[Multi-Factor Models]{.skill-tag} [Backtesting]{.skill-tag} [Market Regime Classification]{.skill-tag} [Risk Metrics (α, β)]{.skill-tag} [IRR / GCoC]{.skill-tag} [Logistic Regression]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .reveal .d1}
<h4><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i> AI / ML Engineering</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[XGBoost]{.skill-tag} [Random Forest]{.skill-tag} [Lasso]{.skill-tag} [SHAP / PDP]{.skill-tag} [RAG]{.skill-tag} [OpenAI API]{.skill-tag} [Claude Code]{.skill-tag} [FAISS]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .reveal .d2}
<h4><i class="bi bi-database"></i> Data & Engineering</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[Python]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [DuckDB]{.skill-tag} [R]{.skill-tag} [Pandas]{.skill-tag} [ETL / ELT]{.skill-tag} [Dimensional Modeling]{.skill-tag} [Tableau]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .reveal .d3}
<h4><i class="bi bi-tools"></i> Tools & Deployment</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[GitHub]{.skill-tag} [Shiny]{.skill-tag} [Streamlit]{.skill-tag} [Quarto]{.skill-tag} [Posit Cloud]{.skill-tag} [React]{.skill-tag} [Leaflet / Mapbox]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::

<!-- ========== CTA ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow .reveal}

[Let's Connect]{.section-label}

## Let's Work Together {.section-heading}

I'm seeking 2026 opportunities in **quantitative finance**, **AI/ML & forward-deployed engineering**, and **data analytics** — roles where rigorous analysis meets real business impact. I'd love to connect.

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sy31){.btn-outline-custom target="_blank"}
:::

:::
:::
